tasks.label: Run Project
tasks.command: $mvn='C:\Program Files\NetBeans-25\netbeans\java\maven\bin\mvn.cmd'; $tomcat='C:\apache-tomcat-9.0.113'; if (!(Test-Path $mvn)) { throw "Maven not found at $mvn" }; if (!(Test-Path "$tomcat\bin\startup.bat")) { throw "Tomcat not found at $tomcat" }; & $mvn clean package -DskipTests; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Copy-Item -Force "${workspaceFolder}\target\FinalDesignProject-1.0-SNAPSHOT.war" "$tomcat\webapps\FinalDesignProject-1.0-SNAPSHOT.war"; $env:CATALINA_HOME=$tomcat; $env:CATALINA_BASE=$tomcat; Push-Location "$tomcat\bin"; & .\startup.bat; Pop-Location; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Start-Process "http://localhost:8080/FinalDesignProject-1.0-SNAPSHOT/"; Write-Host 'Project started at http://localhost:8080/FinalDesignProject-1.0-SNAPSHOT/'
